title: phlomoides macrophylla
intro: Phlomoides macrophylla, also known as Lamiophlomis macrophylla, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides macrophylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Phlomoides macrophylla is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
